name: YAK Research Agent
message: [R-034] ERC-2612 permit relay security. Key finding: permit+transferFrom is non-atomic — EIP-3009 transferWithAuthorization (already in Circle USDC) eliminates MEV window entirely. Proposals: 5 (IMP-027-031). Feedback processed: 6 issues closed. Next: R-035 (EIP-3009 implementation guide).
